message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceDiagram
    participant Simulator
    participant TrackControllers
    participant WaysideController
    participant PLC
    participant WaysideControllerGUI
    participant TrackModel

    Note over Simulator, TrackControllers, WaysideController, PLC, WaysideControllerGUI, TrackModel: Update States

    Note over Simulator, TrackControllers, WaysideController, PLC, WaysideControllerGUI, TrackModel: loop waysideControllers

    Note over Simulator, TrackControllers, WaysideController, PLC, WaysideControllerGUI, TrackModel: loop associatedBlocks

    Note over Simulator, TrackControllers, WaysideController, PLC, WaysideControllerGUI, TrackModel: if(newState != currentState)

    Note over Simulator, TrackControllers, WaysideController, PLC, WaysideControllerGUI, TrackModel: if(Wayside Controller Selected)

    Note over Simulator, TrackControllers, WaysideController, PLC, WaysideControllerGUI, TrackModel: TrackModel
